title: Overtime Pay Calculator - Free Online Tool
description: Free overtime pay calculator. Calculate your overtime earnings at 1.5x or 2x rates. Supports weekly and daily overtime calculations.
keywords: overtime pay calculator, overtime calculator, time and a half calculator, overtime rate, overtime earnings
intro: Calculate your overtime earnings. Enter your hourly rate and overtime hours to see your total pay including overtime premium.

faq.a: Overtime pay is additional compensation for hours worked beyond the standard 40-hour work week, typically at 1.5x your regular hourly rate.
Double time (2x rate) typically applies after 12 hours in a single day or on the 7th consecutive day worked, depending on state law.
Under the FLSA, non-exempt employees must receive overtime pay for hours over 40 per week. Some states have additional daily overtime rules.
